author: poultry
text:
doctor: branch state-checkout check on master_url

bl doctor's drift checks predated bl-ffb4's master_url layout and probed every state checkout as a linked git worktree. On a master_url-configured repo .balls/state-repo/ is a full clone with a .git directory, so the linked-worktree probe always reported false drift — exactly the wrong terminology and the wrong fixing command (bl repair instead of bl prime, which re-runs state_repo::ensure).

Doctor now reads committed config first and branches: legacy mode keeps the linked-worktree probe; master_url mode validates state-repo as a clone (.git is a directory with HEAD) and additionally flags master_url-vs-origin drift — the user-edited config case where the recorded URL and the materialized clone diverge. Read-only throughout; repair stays the only action verb.
